calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brandon Tang, Attorney at Law, Tel. 510.896.9411, for plaintiffs;
Mario Grillo, in pro per, Tel. 415.286.8205, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court required parties to appear. Defendant's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. Judgment debtor shall pay $100.00 per month. The levying officer is directed to release all funds held, except $100.00, to judgment debtor. Order signed and mailed to parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
